title: A black-start control method and system for a wind-solar-storage new energy …
abstract_clean: The invention provides a black start control method and a system for a wind-solar energy storage new energy power station, which comprise the following steps: when the power grid fails and the wind-solar-energy storage new energy power station has a black start condition, the energy storage system outputs voltage based on a voltage reference value continuously set within a certain time, and the voltage and the frequency of a power supply bus are recovered until the voltage and the frequency of the power supply bus reach rated values; after the voltage and the frequency of the power supply bus reach rated values, the wind turbine generator, the photovoltaic generator and the energy storage battery are controlled to supply power based on the wind-solar-energy storage coordination control method, and stable power supply to loads is achieved.

With the increasing dependence of modern society on power supply, the consequences of blackouts are becoming more and more serious. How to enable the system to quickly recover after a blackout, that is, to achieve black start, has become an important issue for the safe operation of modern power systems.

The so-called black start means that after the entire system is shut down due to a fault, the system is completely powered off (it is not excluded that the isolated small power grid still operates), and it is in a completely "black" state, without relying on the help of other networks, through the system with self-starting ability. The generator set starts, drives the generator set without self-starting ability, gradually expands the scope of system recovery, and finally realizes the recovery of the entire system.

Hydropower plants are ideal as black-start power sources for power grids. However, the lack of water resources in local power grids limits the construction of hydropower units. Therefore, according to the special geographical location and needs of the local power grid, finding and constructing a new type of power source that can be used as its black-start power source plays an important role in improving the recovery speed of the power grid after a fault.

Wind energy and photovoltaic power generation have the advantages of being clean and pollution-free, but at the same time have uncertainty and random volatility. Battery energy storage has the characteristics of fast response, flexible power and energy configuration, and installation without geographical restrictions, making it possible for new energy power stations to perform black start. Exploiting the potential functions of energy storage-type new energy power stations to provide auxiliary services for the power grid as the black-start power supply of the power grid will help to increase the reserve capacity of the black-start power supply of the system, improve the recovery speed of the local power grid, and reduce economic losses; Wind farms and photovoltaic power plants can obtain additional benefits.

At present, there are still the following problems in the research of new energy as a black-start power supply: 1. When the energy storage system is self-starting, the output voltage of the energy storage system instantly rises to the rated voltage of the busbar, which causes the transformer to generate a magnetizing inrush current during the charging process and consume a large amount of electric energy. The rated voltage and frequency cannot be established quickly, which leads to a longer self-starting time; 2. After wind power and photovoltaics are put into power generation, the power balance control of the energy storage system does not consider the influence of the state of charge constraint of the energy storage battery on the power balance control, resulting in During the power supply process, the energy storage battery cannot operate normally due to overcharge and overdischarge, resulting in the inability of the system to supply power stably. Therefore, how to solve the above problems existing in the prior art is a problem to be solved by those skilled in the art.
